message.content:
[GAS TOWN] witness (rig: lesson_factory) <- self • 2026-02-22T04:38 • handoff

Check your hook and mail, then act on the hook if present:
1. `gt hook` - shows hooked work (if any)
2. `gt mail inbox` - check for messages
3. If work is hooked → execute it immediately
4. If nothing hooked → wait for instructions

content.thinking: I'm the Witness for the lesson_factory rig. Following GUPP - check hook, execute if work found. Let me check my hook and mail.

  bd mol burn ls-wisp-v7q           # Discard without creating digest

content.text: Good. Now let me see which steps have dependencies (ordering) and find the first one to execute.

input.command:
cd /home/skogix/skogtown/.dolt-data && dolt sql -q "
SELECT i.id, i.title, i.status, 
  GROUP_CONCAT(d2.depends_on_id) as needs
FROM issues i
LEFT JOIN dependencies d2 ON d2.issue_id = i.id AND d2.type = 'needs'
WHERE i.id IN ('ls-wisp-32z','ls-wisp-736','ls-wisp-cjz','ls-wisp-cks','ls-wisp-fby','ls-wisp-m10','ls-wisp-pyg','ls-wisp-uxa','ls-wisp-xq9')
GROUP BY i.id
ORDER BY i.id
" 2>&1

content.text: No ordering deps — all steps are parallel. Let me read the descriptions to understand what each does, then execute them. Starting with the standard patrol flow: inbox check, then polecat survey.

input.command:
cd /home/skogix/skogtown/.dolt-data && dolt sql -q "
SELECT id, title, SUBSTRING(description, 1, 200) as desc_preview
FROM issues 
WHERE id IN ('ls-wisp-pyg','ls-wisp-uxa','ls-wisp-fby','ls-wisp-32z','ls-wisp-cjz','ls-wisp-xq9','ls-wisp-cks','ls-wisp-m10','ls-wisp-736')
ORDER BY id
" 2>&1

content.content:
+-------------+-----------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| id          | title                             | desc_preview                                                                                                               |
+-------------+-----------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| ls-wisp-32z | Check if active swarm is complete | If Mayor started a batch (SWARM_START), check if all polecats have completed.                                              |
|             |                                   |                                                                                                                            |
|             |                                   | **Step 1: Find active swarm tracking wisps**                                                                               |
|             |                                   | ```bash                                                                                                                    |
|             |                                   | bd list --label swarm --status=open                                                                                        |
|             |                                   | ```                                                                                                                        |
|             |                                   | If no active swarm, skip thi                                                                                               |
| ls-wisp-736 | Loop or exit for respawn          | End of patrol cycle decision.                                                                                              |
|             |                                   |                                                                                                                            |
|             |                                   | **If context LOW** (can continue patrolling):                                                                              |
|             |                                   |                                                                                                                            |
|             |                                   | Resolve your agent bead ID for this patrol cycle. You MUST replace `<YOUR_RIG>` below with your actual rig name (e.g., `be |
| ls-wisp-cjz | Process pending cleanup wisps     | Process cleanup wisps (exception handling for dirty polecats).                                                             |
|             |                                   |                                                                                                                            |
|             |                                   | In the ephemeral model, cleanup wisps are only created when a polecat has                                                  |
|             |                                   | dirty state (uncommitted changes, unpushed commits) that preve                                                             |
| ls-wisp-cks | Check own context limit           | Check own context usage.                                                                                                   |
|             |                                   |                                                                                                                            |
|             |                                   | If context is HIGH (>80%):                                                                                                 |
|             |                                   | - Ensure any notes are written to handoff mail                                                                             |
|             |                                   | - Prepare for session restart                                                                                              |
|             |                                   |                                                                                                                            |
|             |                                   | If context is LOW:                                                                                                         |
|             |                                   | - Can continue patrolling                                                                                                  |
| ls-wisp-fby | Ensure refinery is alive          | Ensure the refinery is alive and assess queue health.                                                                      |
|             |                                   |                                                                                                                            |
|             |                                   | **Step 1: Check refinery session**                                                                                         |
|             |                                   | ```bash                                                                                                                    |
|             |                                   | gt session status <rig>/refinery                                                                                           |
|             |                                   | ```                                                                                                                        |
|             |                                   |                                                                                                                            |
|             |                                   | If MRs waiting AND refinery not running:                                                                                   |
|             |                                   | ```bash                                                                                                                    |
|             |                                   | gt session star                                                                                                            |
| ls-wisp-m10 | End-of-cycle inbox hygiene        | Verify inbox hygiene before ending patrol cycle.                                                                           |
|             |                                   |                                                                                                                            |
|             |                                   | **Step 1: Check inbox state**                                                                                              |
|             |                                   | ```bash                                                                                                                    |
|             |                                   | gt mail inbox                                                                                                              |
|             |                                   | ```                                                                                                                        |
|             |                                   |                                                                                                                            |
|             |                                   | In the ephemeral model, most POLECAT_DONE messages are handled immediately                                                 |
|             |                                   | (auto-nuke) and ar                                                                                                         |
| ls-wisp-pyg | Process witness mail              | First, clean up any stale patrol wisps from abnormal exits in previous cycles:                                             |
|             |                                   | ```bash                                                                                                                    |
|             |                                   | bd mol wisp gc --age 1h                                                                                                    |
|             |                                   | ```                                                                                                                        |
|             |                                   |                                                                                                                            |
|             |                                   | Then check inbox and handle messages.                                                                                      |
|             |                                   |                                                                                                                            |
|             |                                   | ```bash                                                                                                                    |
|             |                                   | gt mail inbox                                                                                                              |
|             |                                   | ```                                                                                                                        |
|             |                                   |                                                                                                                            |
|             |                                   | For each message:                                                                                                          |
|             |                                   |                                                                                                                            |
| ls-wisp-uxa | Inspect all active polecats       | Survey all polecats using agent beads and tmux session cross-reference.                                                    |
|             |                                   |                                                                                                                            |
|             |                                   | **Step 1: List polecat agent beads**                                                                                       |
|             |                                   |                                                                                                                            |
|             |                                   | ```bash                                                                                                                    |
|             |                                   | bd list --type=agent --json                                                                                                |
|             |                                   | ```                                                                                                                        |
|             |                                   |                                                                                                                            |
|             |                                   | Filter the JSON output for entries where descrip                                                                           |
| ls-wisp-xq9 | Check timer gates for expiration  | Check for expired timer gates and escalate as needed.                                                                      |
|             |                                   |                                                                                                                            |
|             |                                   | Timer gates are async wait conditions with a timeout. When the timeout expires,                                            |
|             |                                   | the gate should be escalated to the overseer for human interventi                                                          |

      --closed-after string     Filter issues closed after date (YYYY-MM-DD or RFC3339)
      --closed-before string    Filter issues closed before date (YYYY-MM-DD or RFC3339)
      --created-after string    Filter issues created after date (YYYY-MM-DD or RFC3339)
      --created-before string   Filter issues created before date (YYYY-MM-DD or RFC3339)
      --defer-after string      Filter issues deferred after date (supports relative: +6h, tomorrow)
      --defer-before string     Filter issues deferred before date (supports relative: +6h, tomorrow)
      --deferred                Show only issues with defer_until set
      --desc-contains string    Filter by description substring (case-insensitive)
      --due-after string        Filter issues due after date (supports relative: +6h, tomorrow)
      --due-before string       Filter issues due before date (supports relative: +6h, tomorrow)
      --empty-description       Filter issues with empty or missing description
      --format string           Output format: 'digraph' (for golang.org/x/tools/cmd/digraph), 'dot' (Graphviz), or Go template
  -h, --help                    help for list
